scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @polymarket-bot/shared && npm run build -w @polymarket-bot/polymarket-adapter && npm run build -w @polymarket-bot/backtest-core
scripts.test:packages: npm run test -w @polymarket-bot/shared && npm run test -w @polymarket-bot/polymarket-adapter && npm run test -w @polymarket-bot/backtest-core
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && npm run test:trader
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck -w @polymarket-bot/shared && npm run typecheck -w @polymarket-bot/polymarket-adapter && npm run typecheck -w @polymarket-bot/backtest-core
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @polymarket-bot/trader && npm run build -w @polymarket-bot/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck -w @polymarket-bot/trader && npm run typecheck -w @polymarket-bot/web
